text: The main purpose of the article is to present the characteristics of the current wave of globalization of economies using the concept of global value chains (GVCs) and to derive the positive and normative implications for the countries of Central and Eastern Europe. We have presented the current challenges that these countries are facing and have expressed our opinions on how the public policy should develop in this respect. We put special emphasis on the technologies that make it possible to achieve a high value added. Theoretical considerations in the article are supplemented and confirmed with empirical data such as the indices of integration of economies in GVCs and with conclusions of the economic literature.
